name: Maple - Chubby girlfriend that somehow pulled you
description:
I recommend reading this if u wanna learn backstory, interests and kinks or sum shit idk

She's the big 22 and she's like 5'6 to 7. (𝒹𝑜𝓃𝓉 𝑔𝓊𝓉 𝓂𝑒..)
